creator: jarmstrong@wi.rr.com
text:
While upgrading gohugo, it built Brotli-1.1.0 but, due to a casing bug, the script is looking for the wrong Wheel:

FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/usr/ports/archivers/py-brotli/work-py39/Brotli-1.1.0/dist/brotli-1.1.0*.whl'

chestnut_handy 14# ls
Brotli-1.1.0-cp39-cp39-freebsd_13_2_release_p3_amd64.whl
chestnut_handy 15# pwd
/usr/ports/archivers/py-brotli/work-py39/Brotli-1.1.0/dist

It's looking for a lowercase brotli-*.whl but the built Wheel starts with an uppercase B, so it's failing.
